predicate.title: Roadmap priority 4: redefine lead time and agent cycle time
predicate.problem: The dashboard's lead and cycle time bars are near-identical and mostly invisible: both metrics end at the merge commit with starts minutes apart, so overnight and manual-work gaps dominate both equally, and no outlier clipping exists in render_html despite roadmap-priority-2 claiming it was delivered; the owner directs lead time = change opened to merged and cycle time = agent active working time
acceptance_criteria: roadmap-priority-4-agent-cycle-time exists with status active, recording both new definitions, the sessionization rule and 300s idle threshold, the agent-activity/v1 evidence shape, the two-chart dashboard plan, the correction to priority-2's clipping claim, and the no-backfill rule
roadmap-whats-next names roadmap-priority-4-agent-cycle-time as NOW, with slice-2 demoted to NEXT
docs/design/roadmap.md is regenerated from the knowledge nodes
